name: unique-prime-checker

metadata.name: unique-prime-checker
metadata.summary: A simple library to check if a number is prime

documentation:
# Prime Checker Library

A simple Python library to check if a number is prime.

## Installation

```bash
pip install prime_checker

functions.name: prime_checker.core.is_prime
documentation:
Check if a number is prime.

Args:
    number (int): The number to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the number is prime, False otherwise.
